title: Hydraulic Power
description: 本课程可供留学生和中外合作办学机械电子工程和车辆工程本科生选修，课程每章配备了测试和期末考试，可供任课教师对学生进行综合能力测评，辅助教师提高教学效果。Chang’an University is famous in construction machinery field, especially in hydraulic system design. All of the instructors have background from construction machinery design, therefore, in the hydraulic power, you can learn the fundamental principles, components, symbols and applications of hydraulic system, and besides, you can also learn lots of hydraulic system examples from mobile equipment, i.e., excavator, roller, forklift, grader, et al.
